metadata.title:
RED HOT SESSION


AT SPOKANE

Irrigation Congress Going Into Balinge1s


Reclamation Policy Il Is Rumored.

pages.raw_text:
From opinions expressed by dele
gates to the seventeenth national
irrigation congress, which meets
here Monday morning, the sessions
in this city next week will be men,
.orable. The policy of the present
secretary of the interior with re-
gard to the reclamation service and
the administration of the public
domain in general, is to be called
into question, according to the talk
in hotel Hobbies and clubs where
delegates are congregating today.


Final arrangements for the ham
ding of the meetings are to be
made at a meeting of the executive
committee tomorrow. morning. w.
A. Beard of Sacramento, Cal, is ex-
pected early tomorrow and the COM
mittee will at once go into session.


B. A. Fowler of Phoenix, Ariz.,
secretary of the congress, will ar
rive tonight. A delegation of %
